'''D'Skar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Coyn system/Legends|Coyn system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and a rocky wasteland. The name of the planet meant "dagger" in the language of the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynites]] and lent its name to a [[D'skar|weapon]].
